message:
refactor(connectors/aider): clippy lints and idiomatic Rust improvements

Address several clippy warnings and improve code style in the Aider
connector:

- Add #[allow(clippy::unused_self)] to parse_chat_history since the
  method does not currently use self but is part of the trait interface
- Refactor quote-prefix stripping to use chained strip_prefix/or_else/
  unwrap_or instead of nested if-let-else blocks
- Replace map().unwrap_or_else() with map_or_else() for parent path
  resolution, which is more idiomatic
- Use method reference PathBuf::as_path instead of a closure for the
  roots iterator mapping
- Fix newline handling: move push('\n') outside the quoted-vs-unquoted
  conditional branches so all lines consistently get a trailing newline,
  and remove the redundant push('\n') that was inside the quoted branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
